title: 'Workflows' triggers/actions for native integration apps
excerpt: Hey there. I really love the workflows feature. It’s been an absolute game changer for my company and our process automations. I know it’s still in beta, but supporting some of the native monday integration apps like, Ma…

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there. I really love the workflows feature. It’s been an absolute game changer for my company and our process automations. I know it’s still in beta, but supporting some of the native monday integration apps like, Mailchimp, Stripe, Jira, etc. would take it to the next level for us. Are there any plans for this? I assume a lot of other teams have board automations with these integrations that would be helpful in workflows as well.
